<h1 style="color: #D9B08C;text-align: center;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;">Education</h1>

---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2; font-size: 0.8em; font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"> <i class="fas fa-graduation-cap" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> PhD in Marine Science and Technology </span>

<div style="position: relative; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal; color: #D1E8E2;">Cádiz University, Spain</p>
  
  <p style="color:#D1E8E2; font-size: 0.9em;">Antarctic Biogeochemistry and Remote Sensing research.</p>
  
  <img src="ucalogo.png" alt="MI Logo" 
       style="position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0px; height: 100px; width: auto;">
  
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">January 2024 – ongoing</p>
  
  <ul style="font-size: 0.9em; color: #D1E8E2;">
    <li>Antarctic Biogeochemistry and Remote Sensing research.</li>
  </ul>
</div>


---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2;font-size: 0.8em;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> MSc in Oceanography</span>
<div style="position: relative; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal; color: #D1E8E2;">Cadiz University - ICMAN-CSIC, Spain</p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">September 2020 – September 2021</p>
  
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em; color: #D1E8E2;">Deep understanding of biological, physical, chemical and geological<br>
  processes in coastal oceanic systems.</p>
  
  <p style="color: #D1E8E2;">Courses included:</p>
  
  <img src="ucalogo.png" alt="University Logo" 
       style="position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0px; height: 100px; width: auto;">
  
  <ul style="font-size: 0.9em; color: #D1E8E2;">
    <li>Physical, chemical, ecological and geological oceanography</li>
  </ul>
</div>

---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2;font-size: 0.8em;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> BSc Molecular Biology (Erasmus+)</span>

<div style="position: relative; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal; color: #D1E8E2;">Umeå University, Sweden</p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">September 2018 – September 2019</p>
  
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em; color: #D1E8E2;">
    Advanced molecular biology and genetics laboratory techniques.
  </p>
  <p style="color: #D1E8E2;">Courses included:</p>
  
  <img src="umealogo.png" alt="University Logo" 
       style="position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0px; height: 90px; width: auto;">
  
  <ul style="font-size: 0.9em; color: #D1E8E2;">
    <li>Molecular Genetics</li>
    <li>Neurobiology</li>
    <li>Microbiology</li>
  </ul>
</div>

---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2;font-size: 0.8em;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> BSc in Biology</span>

<div style="position: relative; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal; color: #D1E8E2;">Alcala University, Spain</p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">September 2015 – September 2018</p>
  
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em; color: #D1E8E2;">
    Understanding of the basic structures and dynamics<br>
    of living organisms and their interactions with their environment.
  </p>
  
  <img src="uahlogo.png" alt="University Logo" 
       style="position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0px; height: 100px; width: auto;">
</div>




<h1 style="color: #D9B08C;text-align: center;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;">Courses</h1>

---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2; font-size: 0.8em; font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"> <i class="fas fa-graduation-cap" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> PhD Course in spatial data analysis in ecology with R</span>

<div style="margin-left: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal;color:#D1E8E2">Cádiz University, Spain</p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">October 2024</p>
  
  <ul style="font-size: 0.9em;color:#D1E8E2">
      <li>Built foundational skills in spatial analysis using GIS data concepts and R setup for data visualization, cleaning, and GPS data import.</li>
      <li>Applied space-use analysis (MCP, KDE) and trajectory segmentation (EMBC, HMM) to study movement patterns and behaviors in R.</li>
      <li>Conducted habitat modeling by integrating GPS and environmental data, building and validating habitat suitability models in R.</li>
      <li>20 hours</li>
  </ul>

</div> <hr style="border-top: 1px solid #D1E8E2; opacity: 0.2; margin: 20px 0;">



## <span style="color: #D1E8E2; font-size: 0.8em; font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"> <i class="fas fa-graduation-cap" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> Expert in Data Science</span>

<div style="margin-left: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal;color:#D1E8E2">Datamecum</p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">August 2025 - April 2026</p>
  
  <ul style="font-size: 0.9em;color:#D1E8E2">
      <li>Comprehensive training in the data science lifecycle, utilizing Python for data manipulation, cleaning, and analysis (Pandas, NumPy).</li>
      <li>Applied machine learning algorithms and statistical modeling techniques to extract actionable insights from complex datasets.</li>
      <li>Developed proficiency in data visualization and storytelling to communicate findings effectively.</li>
      <li>200 hours</li>
  </ul>

</div> <hr style="border-top: 1px solid #D1E8E2; opacity: 0.2; margin: 20px 0;">
